steps.name: Rename session via UI
steps.evidence: Rename dialog opens with title/input/save. After saving 'Test Session Alpha', sidebar shows 'Test Session Alpha completed 48m ago 2 turns 12f63361'

steps.name: Tag session via UI
steps.evidence: Add tag dialog -> tag 'v2-test' saved -> badge appears. Edit tag pre-fills value, Remove button clears tag.

steps.name: Fork session — menu item + API route
steps.evidence: Fork menu item in dropdown. POST /api/sessions/:id/fork route proxies to gateway. E2E requires live gateway.

steps.name: Rewind button UX
steps.evidence: Button shows 'Rewind to this turn' with HistoryIcon + 'Rewind' label. title='Rewind to this point' tooltip.

steps.name: Migration v5 — title/tag columns
steps.evidence: Migration v5 adds title TEXT + tag TEXT. SELECT queries include title/tag. allowedFields includes title/tag.

steps.name: Search includes title/tag
steps.evidence: SessionSidebar filter checks s.title and s.tag in addition to s.id and s.prompt
